results.content:
Zephyra Outfitters Return Policy — backpacks.
Customers may return backpacks within 21 days of delivery. Items must include original tags. Opened items are subject to a 10% restocking fee of the item price. Unopened returns pay only the flat return shipping fee of $7.99. Refunds are issued to the original payment method within 5 business days of inspection.

Zephyra Outfitters Return Policy — jackets.
Customers may return jackets within 30 days of delivery. Items must include original tags. Opened items are subject to a 10% restocking fee of the item price. Unopened returns pay only the flat return shipping fee of $7.99. Refunds are issued to the original payment method within 5 business days of inspection.

Zephyra Outfitters Return Policy — stoves.
Customers may return stoves within 45 days of delivery. Items must include original tags. Opened items are subject to a 10% restocking fee of the item price. Unopened returns pay only the flat return shipping fee of $7.99. Refunds are issued to the original payment method within 5 business days of inspection.

Zephyra Outfitters Return Policy — tents.
Customers may return tents within 21 days of delivery. Items must include original tags. Opened items are subject to a 10% restocking fee of the item price. Unopened returns pay only the flat return shipping fee of $7.99. Refunds are issued to the original payment method within 5 business days of inspection.

Zephyra Outfitters Return Policy — sleeping bags.
Customers may return sleeping bags within 30 days of delivery. Items must include original tags. Opened items are subject to a 10% restocking fee of the item price. Unopened returns pay only the flat return shipping fee of $7.99. Refunds are issued to the original payment method within 5 business days of inspection.

Product Guide — Larkspindle 2.
The Larkspindle 2 is part of our tents range. It is designed for three-season use and weighs less than comparable models in its class. For current price and stock, consult the product catalog; for return windows and warranty, see the category policies.

Product Guide — Larkspindle 4.
The Larkspindle 4 is part of our tents range. It is designed for three-season use and weighs less than comparable models in its class. For current price and stock, consult the product catalog; for return windows and warranty, see the category policies.

Product Guide — Kestrelloft Ridge.
The Kestrelloft Ridge is part of our tents range. It is designed for three-season use and weighs less than comparable models in its class. For current price and stock, consult the product catalog; for return windows and warranty, see the category policies.
